description: This file defines Express.js route handlers for managing 'shifts' in a manufacturing line performance monitoring backend. It includes endpoints for listing, creating/updating, retrieving, and deleting shift records, utilizing a schema for validation, middleware for authentication and role-based access, and real-time event publishing.

methods.name: router.get("/")
methods.description: Handles GET requests to list shifts with an optional limit parameter, requiring authentication.

methods.name: router.post("/")
methods.description: Handles POST requests to create or update a shift, requiring authentication and specific roles, with payload validation.

methods.name: router.get("/:id")
methods.description: Handles GET requests to retrieve a specific shift by ID, requiring authentication.

methods.name: router.delete("/:id")
methods.description: Handles DELETE requests to remove a shift by ID, requiring admin role.
